FR-001.title: Each of the three catalogs MUST have its own dedicated paginated list screen consistent with existing catalogs

FR-002.title: Each list screen MUST ship a free-text search box wired to the server-side search capability requested upstream

FR-003.title: Each list screen MUST expose backend-supported facet filters, combinable with each other and with search

FR-004.title: Create MUST be a primary action beside the filter/search bar, visible only with create privilege

FR-005.title: Row's sole direct action MUST be Edit; clicking elsewhere opens the read-only detail screen

FR-006.title: Read-only detail MUST offer a switch-to-edit control only when the user holds update privilege

FR-007.title: Delete MUST live only on the detail screen, require confirmation, and be gated by delete privilege

FR-008.title: Every create/update/delete MUST be gated by the existing per-catalog access-control privilege

FR-009.title: All three catalogs MUST be reachable from the existing catalog navigation, gated by read privilege

FR-010.title: Screen-level actions other than the read-only-to-edit toggle MUST be visible-label body buttons

FR-011.title: All three catalogs MUST display status via the shared status badge and reuse the shared status concept

FR-012.title: Backend rejections on save or delete MUST be surfaced in place without discarding unsaved input

FR-013.title: Warehouses MUST support CRUD with fields facility, code, name, comment, status

FR-014.title: Warehouse facility, code, and name MUST be required on create

FR-015.title: Warehouse form MUST provide a searchable facility picker; facility displayed by name with a fallback label

FR-016.title: Cash Drawers MUST support CRUD with fields facility, code, name, comment, status

FR-017.title: Cash drawer facility, code, and name MUST be required on create

FR-018.title: Cash drawer form MUST provide the same searchable facility picker with by-name display and fallback

FR-019.title: Points of Sale MUST support CRUD with fields facility, code, name, warehouse, comment, status

FR-020.title: Point of sale facility, code, name, and warehouse MUST be required on create

FR-021.title: Point-of-sale form MUST provide searchable facility and warehouse pickers, both displayed by name with fallbacks

FR-022.title: Point-of-sale warehouse picker MUST offer only warehouses of the selected facility and force reselection on facility change

FR-023.title: Facility picker and filter MUST read facilities only, with no create/edit/delete affordance in this feature

FR-024.title: Facility type MAY be shown as a plain label but MUST NOT change any screen's behavior, fields, or layout

FR-025.title: Reading facilities MUST degrade gracefully: the list still renders and facility controls show their empty state

FR-026.title: Facility type MUST be named in one domain enum (Store 0 / Production Site 1); no screen reads raw type numbers

context: area: lib/features/catalog (existing shared master-data module, extended)
area: lib/generated/openapi — WarehousesApi, PointsOfSaleApi, CashDrawersApi, FacilitiesApi (full CRUD already generated)
constraint: reuse shared EntityStatus at lib/core/domain/entity_status.dart — no new status enum
constraint: RBAC objects warehouses(4)/pointsOfSale(9)/cashDrawers(10) already exist; no facilities object exists
constraint: no search param on any of the four list endpoints — file upstream, never client-side filter (constitution III/VI)
constraint: reuse DataTableView, CatalogPagination, CatalogFilterBar/SearchBar, CatalogFilterSheet, CatalogEntityPicker, ResponsiveFormGrid, ErrorBanner unmodified
upstream: mbe-api #86/#87/#88/#89 search param; #90 address FK, #91 logo upload, #92 FacilityType names, #93 facilities SystemObject — filed 2026-07-19
resolved: mbe-api FacilityType IntEnum is STORE=0, PRODUCTION_SITE=1 — issue #92 closed 2026-07-19; name it UI-side per the EntityStatus/Gender pattern
intent: Deliver full CRUD catalog UIs for the three facility-scoped operational catalogs — Warehouses, Points of Sale, and Cash Drawers — consuming Facility read-only as a picker and filter.
expectations: Facilities management (create/edit/delete) and any Facilities screen — deferred pending upstream address management, logo upload, named facility-type values, and a facility access-control object
Cash drawer sessions (open/close/reconcile) — master record only
Warehouse stock, lots, serial numbers, and movements — master record only
Bulk import/export (CSV) for any of the three catalogs
Client-side filtering as a substitute for the missing server-side search param
